code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Group triples by subject to allow multiple entities
    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_map = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        subject_map[t.subject].append(t)

    # Simple predicate → phrase templates
    templates = {
        # Airport‑specific predicates (more natural phrasing)
        "cityServed": "serves {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "is {obj} feet above sea level",
        "runwayLength": "the runway length of {subj} is {obj}",
        "runwayName": "the runway name of {subj} is {obj}",
        "location": "is located in {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "is operated by {obj}",
        "country": "is in {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {obj}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "the ICAO code for {subj} is {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": "the location identifier for {subj} is {obj}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "the IATA code for {subj} is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "the first runway length at {subj} is {obj} feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "the first runway length at {subj} is {obj} metres",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "the first runway at {subj} has a {obj} surface",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "the first runway number at {subj} is {obj}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": "the second runway at {subj} has a {obj} surface",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": "the third runway at {subj} has a {obj} surface",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": "the fourth runway at {subj} has a {obj} surface",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": "the fifth runway at {subj} has a {obj} surface",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "the runway surface at {subj} is {obj}",
        # Generic entity predicates (subject‑centric)
        "leader": "the leader of {subj} is {obj}",
        "capital": "the capital of {subj} is {obj}",
        "language": "the language of {subj} is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "the official language of {subj} is {obj}",
        "currency": "the currency of {subj} is the {obj}",
        "owner": "the owner of {subj} is {obj}",
        "foundingYear": "{subj} was founded in {obj}",
        "founder": "{subj} was founded by {obj}",
        "postalCode": "the postal code of {subj} is {obj}",
        "areaCode": "the area code of {subj} is {obj}",
        "largestCity": "the largest city of {subj} is {obj}",
        "countySeat": "the county seat of {subj} is {obj}",
        "mayor": "the mayor of {subj} is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": "the leader party of {subj} is {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "the leader title of {subj} is {obj}",
        "chief": "the chief of {subj} is {obj}",
        "hubAirport": "the hub airport for {subj} is {obj}",
        "regionServed": "{subj} serves the region {obj}",
        "nativeName": "the native name of {subj} is {obj}",
        "jurisdiction": "{subj} has jurisdiction in {obj}",
        # Biological classification predicates
        "class": "the class of {subj} is {obj}",
        "division": "the division of {subj} is {obj}",
        "order": "the order of {subj} is {obj}",

    # Helper to format numbers nicely (remove trailing .0 and add commas)
    def _fmt_number(val: str) -> str:
        try:
            num = float(val.replace(",", ""))
            if num.is_integer():
                num = int(num)
            return f"{num:,}"
        except Exception:
            return val

    sentences = []
    for subject, tlist in subject_map.items():
        parts = []  # will store tuples (predicate, phrase, raw_obj)
        for t in tlist:
            tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
            obj = t.object.strip('"')
            if tmpl:
                # Try to format numeric objects nicely
                try:
                    num = float(obj.replace(",", ""))
                    fmt_obj = _fmt_number(obj)
                except Exception:
                    fmt_obj = obj
                # Provide both subject and object for templates that need them
                parts.append((t.predicate, tmpl.format(subj=subject, obj=fmt_obj), obj))
            else:
                pred = t.predicate.replace('_', ' ')
                parts.append((t.predicate, f"{pred} {obj}", obj))

        # Combine parts into a fluent sentence
        if parts:
            if len(parts) == 1:
                pred, phrase, raw_obj = parts[0]
                # Special handling for a few common predicates
                if pred == "runwayLength":
                    fmt = _fmt_number(raw_obj)
                    sentence = f"The runway length of {subject} is {fmt}."
                elif pred == "runwayName":
                    sentence = f"The runway name of {subject} is {raw_obj}."
                elif pred == "1stRunwayLengthMetre":
                    fmt = _fmt_number(raw_obj)
                    sentence = f"The length of the first runway at {subject} is {fmt} metres."
                elif pred == "1stRunwayLengthFeet":
                    fmt = _fmt_number(raw_obj)
                    sentence = f"The length of the first runway at {subject} is {fmt} feet."
                elif pred == "1stRunwayNumber":
                    sentence = f"The first runway number of {subject} is {raw_obj}."
                elif pred == "5thRunwayNumber":
                    sentence = f"The fifth runway number of {subject} is {raw_obj}."
                elif pred == "1stRunwaySurfaceType":
                    sentence = f"The first runway at {subject} is made from {raw_obj.lower()}."
                elif pred == "4thRunwaySurfaceType":
                    sentence = f"The fourth runway at {subject} is made from {raw_obj.lower()}."
                elif pred == "runwaySurfaceType":
                    sentence = f"The runway surface at {subject} is {raw_obj.lower()}."
                elif pred == "locationIdentifier":
                    sentence = f"The location identifier for {subject} is {raw_obj}."
                elif pred == "icaoLocationIdentifier":
                    sentence = f"The ICAO code for {subject} is {raw_obj}."
                elif pred == "iataLocationIdentifier":
                    sentence = f"The IATA code for {subject} is {raw_obj}."
                elif pred == "capital":
                    sentence = f"The capital of {subject} is {raw_obj}."
                elif pred == "demonym":
                    sentence = f"The people of {subject} are called {raw_obj}."
                elif pred == "language":
                    # If object ends with "languages" use passive form
                    if raw_obj.lower().endswith("languages"):
                        sentence = f"The {raw_obj} are spoken in {subject}."
                    else:
                        # Strip redundant “ language” suffix if present
                        lang = raw_obj
                        if lang.lower().endswith(" language"):
                            lang = lang[: -len(" language")]
                        sentence = f"The language spoken in {subject} is {lang}."
                elif pred == "officialLanguage":
                    # Strip redundant “ language” suffix if present
                    lang = raw_obj
                    if lang.lower().endswith(" language"):
                        lang = lang[: -len(" language")]
                    sentence = f"The official language of {subject} is {lang}."
                else:
                    sentence = f"{subject} {phrase}."
            else:
                # Combine multiple predicates into one fluent sentence
                # Define a priority order for predicates to improve natural flow
                priority = {
                    "location": 0,
                    "cityServed": 1,
                    "country": 2,
                    "isPartOf": 3,
                    "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": 4,
                    "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": 4,
                    "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": 4,
                    "runwayLength": 5,
                    "1stRunwayLengthMetre": 5,
                    "1stRunwayLengthFeet": 5,
                    "runwayName": 6,
                    "1stRunwayNumber": 7,
                    "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": 8,
                    "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": 8,
                    "4thRunwaySurfaceType": 8,
                    "5thRunwaySurfaceType": 8,
                    "runwaySurfaceType": 8,
                    "operatingOrganisation": 9,
                    "owner": 10,
                    "icaoLocationIdentifier": 11,
                    "iataLocationIdentifier": 12,
                    "locationIdentifier": 13,
                }
                # Sort parts according to priority (default large number if not listed)
                sorted_parts = sorted(parts, key=lambda x: priority.get(x[0], 100))
                phrase_list = [p for _, p, _ in sorted_parts]
                # Build sentence with proper commas and conjunction
                if len(phrase_list) == 2:
                    combined = " and ".join(phrase_list)
                else:
                    combined = ", ".join(phrase_list[:-1]) + ", and " + phrase_list[-1]
                sentence = f"{subject} {combined}."
            sentences.append(sentence)

    return " ".join(sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
